name: Moderately Armored
summary: You have trained to master the use of medium armor and shields, gaining the following benefits:

documentBlocks.text: You have trained to master the use of medium armor and shields, gaining the following benefits:

items: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
You gain proficiency with medium armor and shields.
